items.text: Venus and north node in Aquarius 10h. Saturn in cap 9h. Dreams: money, stability and security, travel and love. Learned Lessons: setting better boundaries, self love and acceptance, strength in personal identity.
The chart behind you is almost identical to mine. 🤯🤯🤯

hey taurus rising here. I have a Taurus Venus, north node in Virgo and Saturn in Capricorn.
life is awful man I'm literally an orphan

Taurus raising, lost an aunt, brother and dog in the span of two months, isolation and identity crisis. (Venus in Capricorn 8th house) north node in Leo 4th house, satrun jn Aires 12th house, ig belonging or feeling fulfilled I wanna be recognized at something I wanna be the best at something, I wanna experience different lives in different parts of the world. I attract unhealed versions of myself/people who need help/lessons ig with friendships betrayals/stalkers

Taurus Rising. Scorpio Venus 7H. North Node Leo in 4H. Saturn in Aries 12H. My dream is to start dreaming again. My dream is to live in my body not in my mind. I feel like I have attracted lessons on perception vs reality. Lessons of my own insecurities and fears.

Girl you just described my life. I’m a Taurus rising, Venus in Libra, North N in Capricorn, Saturn in Cancer. I have been through it for the past 3 years. My dream is to have some sense of Peace in my life, not to feel so alone and to make my business successful. I’ve attracted chaos for some reason. Chaos in the sense of ups and down 10 minutes good then out of nowhere horrible.

Locked in as soon as you said going through it. Taurus rising, 4th house Venus but in Virgo, 4th house nn in Leo, 1st house Taurus Saturn. I have an amazing career, friends, family, finance, even an incredible glow up, but a passionate love is alluding me. Met someone who is like a stone thrown on water coming in and out of my life who feels perfect but what I’m attracting is lack with that right now. I’ve been on a ramped up spiritual journey the last two months as a result where my entire worldviews related to manifestation, the way I’ve seen the world, and how to get my desires, or even what my desires are, has shifted, multiple times, sometimes daily. The lesson I am feeling right now is that I need to let go. Past, future, forget it. Presence is what I’m trying to practice. Pure love and appreciation for the present moment.

taurus rising, venus and saturn in taurus in the first house, as well. north node and sun in cancer in the third house. I also have a stellium in sagittarius (mars, pluto, chiron) in the eighth house, and moon in capricorn in the ninth house. Lost my grandmother who was part of my everyday life at a young age which made me question a lot, and then lost all of my family pets within a few days of eachother during the pandemic. I’ve had various friendship losses (though a few by my own fault). I’ve never been in a romantic relationship and I have just turned 25. I tend to be a very lucky person, I always find out how to make things work but, I have a tendency to think I’m not doing enough or that I’m behind. In the past year, I have moved to a different country with a different language and I have felt a shift of genuine happiness and sense of self that I had not felt in a long time. I don’t think I’ve had a hard life and I’m very grateful for my experiences and privileges that I have. I want to find and pursue what I’m passionate about and not have to worry about the financial upkeep and I want to keep learning about all sorts of things whether that’s through schooling or through other mediums across cultures, language, food, and the world. I want the chance of adventure and new things but also the ability to fall back to my safe space of slow comfort with someone who grounds me and can match my shifting energy. In the past, I believe that I have attracted lessons of loss, learning to not take things so seriously, and stop giving more than I receive, and to enjoy the present for what it is and look forward for what is next to come. :’)

I am Taurus rising, my Venus is in 8th house, North nod in Capricorn 10th house , Saturn in Libra 6th house ... My dream is returning "home" by getting free from this matrix Fully, I mean not only body but specifically mind and soul to tast real freedom... My repetitive pattern is "feeling of never belonging to no where and no one" since I can remember in my childhood and attracting toxic, unhealed unappreciative people who only know to take and take more , I ruined my whole life trying to fix and help them .

Taurus rising here 1H, Venus and north node in 7H Scorpio. Saturn 11H in Pisces. I dream of being free, financially stable, able to roam and return to a secure home. I attracted unhealed people that I give love to because I have so much love, until I’m drained and they continue to take. In all relationships. Then I have to start over to build my confidence, trust and self love.

I’m not sure I consider myself having a hard life but I can definitely say it has been intensely stressful physically, psychologically, emotionally and spiritually. I have Venus Pisces, Saturn Virgo and north node Aquarius. I feel like I attract unhealed people and I always find myself trying to fix or help them which tends to distract me from my own needs and get lost in everyone else
Sag sun Aries moon Taurus rising. north node in Aries 11H , Saturn in Leo 4H , been going throooooughhhh it

Venus in Aries 11th house, north node cancer 2nd house, Saturn in Taurus 1st house as a Taurus Rising
My dream hmm! I want to impact people, I want to help people. I want to make so much money that it serves to impact people's life. I would also want to set my table and have a community ( just working towards my fear of being seen and my shyness).
To be honest, I hate the conventional way of work.
I have attracted more wounded people (but finally learnt the hard way that it is not my job to save them). Also I used to easily get attached but I am learning to be detached when someone comes in my life and let it flow. I'm still an emotional person but I have to accept the fact that people might not be here to stay.

heyy Taurus rising here .. Venus and North Node in Libra in 6th, Saturn in Aquarius in 10th house.. I also have a 8th house stellium of Sun, Moon and Mercury in Sagittarius.. Truly my dream is to meet a man who’s a giver.. I feel like I’ve always given myself in a relationship (romantic and non romantic) and people have just taken from me and not cared that they drained me.. truly ive uplifted people raised them to reach their potential and then they’ve left me.. I truly want to meet a man who’s a giver more than I am because I haven’t experienced that.. I had a 8 year relationship where the guy I was with I truly built him from the ground up and gave him my everything and he left me saying his parents don’t want him to get married to me 😔
Taurus rising ♉️and moon. Scorpio sun. Venus and NN in Cap ♑️9H. Saturn in Sag♐️. Say less or say more idc

Venus is in 8H Sag, NN in Sag 8H , Saturn is in my 10H Aquarius. I want adventures that scares me , that motivates me. A countryside experience with nothing but nature and calming energy. I have felt sooo stagnant, career wise and in my relationships as well.

In placidus (taurus rising 15d), venus in 10h pisces, Saturn in 9H Aquarius, NN in 8H Sagittarius. Different in whole sign but I prefer placidus. My Saturn return entailed becoming suddenly orphaned at 28, getting married a few months later, and moving city unexpectedly. I feel I attract polarising aspects of stability in people and instability in circumstances. With a musical heritage my dream is carry that torch and I’m working on it. I also have become something of a “digital nomad”. It all checks out.

Taurus rising, Venus in the 9th in Aquarius, NN in the 12th in Aries, Saturn in the 3rd Cancer. i honestly wish to live in complete solidarity away from my blood family, with my soul family. Unlimited (or comfortable amount) of financial resources. Always felt spiritual attacks and evil eye, i just want to be happy without being a target of "humbling" ya know?✨️✨️🙌🏽 also worked hard to not be such a pessimist due to familial thought patterns.⚠️SOOOOO I wish to be an optimist and philosophical without recieving reality-checks from the universe through ppl😭😭ALSOOO I wish to be a flight attendant, to travel the world😋😋😋
I’ll get back to you girl I’m at work
Venus in 11th house, shift in social circle. Saturn in 8th house? and North node in 12house? Yes isolation is my coping mechanism.

Taurus rising here. My chart ruler Venus is in the 10th house (Aquarius) and both my Saturn and North Node are in my 2nd house (Gemini). I'm 24 now and haven't had a stable income since I was 21. I actually recently lost my job because of new management. My only dream is to be able to live comfortably and get married to my partner. I'm tired of constantly being in survival mode and not being able to afford things I need. I can't even plan fun trips for myself without the universe telling me I don't deserve them.
Cap venus 9th house, taurus north node 12th house, saturn cancer 2nd house
Cap venus 9th house
Cap venus 9th hoise

taurus rising, taurus sun, Virgo moon.
12th house venus 12th house saturn, north node in taurus.. my whole life has changed in last 7 years..insane flips

Venus cancer, north node libra, Saturn Aries. Dreams are freedom to explore play create in any and every way I desire. Money to pursue all of my hobbies and follow all my adventures. And have an online community where I inspire and help others to do the same. I keep attracting burnout cycles

Venus 8th house NN in first house Saturn retrograde in 3 house 🏠
my dream I can have my home that feel home peace and be my sanctuary joy and I want to look attractive LIKE I want to feel safe about my place and my body 🥺
👁️I usually attract the lesson about how I became people pleasure and how about massive relationship like cheating or fighting, but it’s not my story at my something like family trauma I especially about money like my friend come to me because money and they gone or I got scam I lost a lot of money💖

Venus and Saturn in the first, north node in the 4th - I would kill to be an artist that could sell from home, also owning a home is a huge goal. I feel like I’m constantly getting into relationships with people that use/neglect me or rely too much on me

taurus rising here! NN 10th house in aquarius, venus 6th house stellium in 6th house, saturn 9th house capricorn. .. my dream is to be free from this avatar ive been playing that doesnt fit who i am as a person. to be free… to travel more and find my perfect person. free myself from limiting mindset. i attract love.. beauty, but also energy vampires and lessons related to becoming less codependent… and stepping out of my comfort zone
Uranus just left our first house after being there for 8-ish years. We have been through it 😅🫩

I’m a Taurus rising I have Venus in Sag in the 8th, NN in Libra in the 6th and Saturn in Pisces in the 11th, I think my biggest dream is to be able to back pack Latin America for a year BUT I currently work a 9-5 with the government, I fear losing financial freedom for something that is temporary, my dad got diagnosed with cancer in the last year so I just been around the house helping my family so I feel stuck with my job and family at home and so I fear I’ll never really have a life of my own. I think biggest lesson with my life is to always expect the unexpected and just be prepared to be let down especially with relationships.

Taurus rising, 1st house, Venus cancer 3rd house, N node Gemini 2nd house, Saturn Libra 6th house. In the last 18 months I’ve been married, had a massive medical diagnosis, had to sell our house and move back to the one place I said I never live again, closed my business, left my husband, became a nomad and gotten divorced.
Venus in Aries. north node in Sag. Saturn in Aquarius. My dream is to own a ship, and learn how to deep sea dive and look for lost vessels.

Taurus Rising, North Node Libra, Venus Scorpio, Saturn Pisces. I crave a guilt free life full of beautiful things and I attract people who drain me of those exact things, I am full of abundance and beauty when I focus on myself

Taurus rising 1st here Scorpio Stellium (Sun/Venus/Pluto) 7th and North node in Aquarius 10th I lost love and jobs and I have some sickness that not able to work , I lost and betrayed by a man I created home from the scratch with and I been hexed like done dark stuffs black magic that almost died so yes I’m going through it

Taurus Rising here, absolutely going thru it since Oct 2025, triggered by things that happened early 2025! Still going the fck thru it. Lost my corporate role, complete mindset and identity shift, lots more. Anyways, SATURN 1H Taurus, NORTH NODE 4H Leo, Venus 6H Libra

Venus in Sag 8H stellium, NN in Gemini, Scorpio Saturn 7H stellium. I am also a Capricorn Sun… I’ve lost my Mom, I’ve had unsuccessful relationships, my job is really stressing me out. I just want to travel, find someone to do life with. I feel like I attract broken people.
Venus in fifth/virgo. North node in tenth/Aquarius. Saturn in ninth/capricorn.
Taurus rising- Venus first house Gemini, Saturn first house and North Node retrograde Aquarius 11th house.

I’m a Taurus rising! Venus in Taurus in 12h, north node in Virgo, Saturn also in 12h in Taurus 😅 I started my own business/freelance, I am a photographer - my dream is to travel the world and shoot big events, fashion week, be published in magazines and most importantly be free! I feel like I attract a lot of money lessons, undercharging myself, getting unexpected payments come out of nowhere, being on a roller coaster with money - extremely good and bad months back to back

Taurus Rising, Venus in Capricorn 8th House, North Node Taurus 12th house (my rising is very close to the cusp), Saturn 7th house Sag. I’ve left my job that I loved because of bullying, eating disorder flare up and my long term partner cheating in the last 3 weeks. My dream is to have a flower farm and do reiki there and run grief and healing circles. I feel like I attract being misunderstood and some abandonment, intellectualising everything, addiction, extremes of everything (good and challenging), lots of endings and death (but that’s probably my 8th house stellium!)

Aries Venus 12th house, Aqua NN 10th house, Virgo Saturn 5th house, I’m interested in being in the public policy and media/film field if that makes sense. I also wish to pursue higher education later in life, travel, and express myself fully and physically in appearance. I’ve learned to control what I can when facing obstacles, and I’m still learning to socialize as I’m an ambivert haha

Taurus rising. Saturn Aries in 12th, Pisces Venus in 11th, north node Virgo in 5th. My dream would be to able to be rich enough to help animals and people in need and have my family continue my dream for generations. I attract people who get mad at me for setting boundaries, people who abuse me for wearing my heart on my sleeve and people who think I’m not smart.

Leo sun, Taurus rising. Saturn 1st house, north node 7th, Venus in 5th. I want community. I do all the things: volunteer, find common interests, started a book club, but can’t seem to make friends beyond acquaintances. It can be lonely but I have one good friend plus a loving partner, so I hold them close. People always assume I’m super independent, strong, and can go it alone. I can, but I don’t want to. I truly am unsure what I attract. I’ll have to think about this more.

Taurus rising! Sagittarius stellium 8th house (Venus, Saturn, Mercury, Pluto, Sun, and Moon) Mars 11th house Pisces. North Node 2nd house Gemini. I would like a life without reoccurring loss. Most my family has passed suddenly or by their choosing to. Which had caused me to have a rare chronic illness that makes me close to death at times lol. I dream to have a peaceful life and receive the love I give. Life has taught me to not be so forgiving and set better boundaries. Life has also taught me that it is not permanent and people treat others like it is.

Taurus rising , Taurus NN in 1st house ..Venus and Saturn in Pisces 12th .. lost a lot in my life since 2017 …I look back at my old self and really don’t know her anymore… the people pleasing , the being there for everyone and getting nothing in return ..I learned how to set boundaries and stand up for myself finally ….Now I just want true connection in my life whether it be friends , family or in love…I value my stability, my peace and my spiritual life .. it’s something I built myself and no one can take that away from me 😘
@barb 🇨🇦: Venus in Capricorn 10th house. North Node in Cancer 3rd house. Saturn in Scorpio 6th house. Dream is to look after family. I attract endings and fresh starts.
You tell me as I have no idea other than Im Cap sun, Taurus moon and rising 😎

taurus rising,libra sun and stellium in 6th house(venus,sun,mercury,mars, pluto,uranus,vertex) ,nn in sagittarius in 8th,venus in virgo in 6th house,saturn in cancer in 4th house...intense power struggles is my life but all i want is a small house by the sea and someone i can laugh with.

Taurus rising with Gemini Venus in 1H, Leo North Node in 4H, Taurus Saturn in the 12H, the 12H is Aries though and it’s got a Sun, Saturn, Mercury and Jupiter stellium. My MC is Aquarius. If I could do anything, I’d throw really great parties that lots of people attended and make a really great TV show that lots of people watched and I think I should be allowed to run several countries. I also dream of a world where no one says the word ‘resilient’ ever again! As far as what I attract, I’m cursed with gaining understanding and empathy for different kinds of people by any means necessary and often at some great cost to me. Thanks so much for asking
